judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the time period with the least deaths per year. 
From the original table, the "deaths per year" column shows:
1950-1955: 66,000
1955-1960: 76,000
1960-1965: 89,000
1965-1970: 105,000
1970-1975: 121,000
...(and so on, increasing each period).
The smallest value in this column is 66,000 for the period 1950-1955. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of "1950-1955" is correct.
